# Data Model: mos_target_wd_gaia_dr3_parquet


MOS Target Table: wd_gaia_dr3


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example DATAFRAME List](#example-dataframe-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
Catalogue of white dwarfs in Gaia EDR3 Gentile Fusillo et al. (2021).

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_wd_gaia_dr3.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
146 MB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### wdjname

- Column Name: wdjname
- Description: WD name (JHHMMSS.ss+DDMMSS.ss) equinox and epoch 2000
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### gaiaedr3

- Column Name: gaiaedr3
- Description: Gaia EDR3 source_id
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### gaiadr2

- Column Name: gaiadr2
- Description: Gaia DR2 source_id
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### edr3name

- Column Name: edr3name
- Description: GaiaEDR3 name (Gaia EDR3 NNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNN)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### radeg

- Column Name: radeg
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Barycentric right ascension (ICRS) at Ep=2016.0
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_radeg

- Column Name: e_radeg
- Description: Gaia EDR3 standard error on right ascension, e_RA=e_RA*cosDE
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float64


#### dedeg

- Column Name: dedeg
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Barycentric declination (ICRS) at Ep=2016.0
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_dedeg

- Column Name: e_dedeg
- Description: Gaia EDR3 standard error on declination
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float64


#### plx

- Column Name: plx
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Absolute stellar parallax at Ep=2016.0
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_plx

- Column Name: e_plx
- Description: Gaia EDR3 parallax error
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float64


#### rplx

- Column Name: rplx
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Parallax divided by its standard error
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### zpcor

- Column Name: zpcor
- Description: Zero point offset correction (Lindegren et al., 2020A&A...633A...2L)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### pwd

- Column Name: pwd
- Description: The probability of being a white dwarf
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### density

- Column Name: density
- Description: The number of Gaia sources in the same ~= 50 arcsec sq. bin as this object
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### solid

- Column Name: solid
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Solution ID
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### randomi

- Column Name: randomi
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Random index used to select subsets
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### epoch

- Column Name: epoch
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Reference epoch
- Unit: yr
- Data Type: Int64


#### pm

- Column Name: pm
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Total proper motion
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_pm

- Column Name: e_pm
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Total proper motion error
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### pmra

- Column Name: pmra
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Proper motion in RA, pmRA*cosDE
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_pmra

- Column Name: e_pmra
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Proper motion in RA error
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### pmde

- Column Name: pmde
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Proper motion in DE
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_pmde

- Column Name: e_pmde
- Description: Gaia EDR3 Proper motion in DE error
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float64


#### radecor

- Column Name: radecor
- Description: Correlation between right ascension and declination
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### raplxcor

- Column Name: raplxcor
- Description: Correlation between right ascension and parallax
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### rapmracor

- Column Name: rapmracor
- Description: Correlation between right ascension and proper motion in right ascension
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### rapmdecor

- Column Name: rapmdecor
- Description: Correlation between right ascension and proper motion in declination
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### deplxcor

- Column Name: deplxcor
- Description: Correlation between declination and parallax
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### depmracor

- Column Name: depmracor
- Description: Correlation between declination and proper motion in right ascension
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### depmdecor

- Column Name: depmdecor
- Description: Correlation between declination and proper motion in declination
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### plxpmracor

- Column Name: plxpmracor
- Description: Correlation between parallax and proper motion in right ascension
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### plxpmdecor

- Column Name: plxpmdecor
- Description: Correlation between parallax and proper motion in declination
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### pmrapmdecor

- Column Name: pmrapmdecor
- Description: Correlation between proper motion in right ascension and proper motion in declination
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### nal

- Column Name: nal
- Description: Total number of observations AL
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### nac

- Column Name: nac
- Description: Total number of observations AC
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### ngal

- Column Name: ngal
- Description: Number of good observations AL
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### nbal

- Column Name: nbal
- Description: Number of bad observations AL
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### gofal

- Column Name: gofal
- Description: Goodness of fit statistic of model wrt along-scan observations
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### chi2al

- Column Name: chi2al
- Description: AL chi-square value
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### epsi

- Column Name: epsi
- Description: Excess noise of the source
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float64


#### sepsi

- Column Name: sepsi
- Description: Significance of excess noise
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### solved

- Column Name: solved
- Description: Which parameters have been solved for?
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### apf

- Column Name: apf
- Description: Primary or secondary
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### nueff

- Column Name: nueff
- Description: Effective wavenumber of the source used in the astrometric solution
- Unit: um-1
- Data Type: Float64


#### pscol

- Column Name: pscol
- Description: Astrometrically estimated pseudocolour of the source
- Unit: um
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_pscol

- Column Name: e_pscol
- Description: Standard error of the pseudocolour of the source
- Unit: um
- Data Type: Float64


#### rapscolcorr

- Column Name: rapscolcorr
- Description: Correlation between right ascension and pseudocolour
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### depscolcorr

- Column Name: depscolcorr
- Description: Correlation between declination and pseudocolour
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### plxpscolcorr

- Column Name: plxpscolcorr
- Description: Correlation between parallax and pseudocolour
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### pmrapscolcorr

- Column Name: pmrapscolcorr
- Description: Correlation between proper motion in right ascension and pseudocolour
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### pmdepscolcorr

- Column Name: pmdepscolcorr
- Description: Correlation between proper motion in declination and pseudocolour
- Unit: -1/1
- Data Type: Float64


#### matchobsa

- Column Name: matchobsa
- Description: Matched FOV transits used in the AGIS solution
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### nper

- Column Name: nper
- Description: Number of visibility periods used in Astrometric solution
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### amax

- Column Name: amax
- Description: The longest semi-major axis of the 5--10 error ellipsoid
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float64


#### matchobs

- Column Name: matchobs
- Description: The total number of field-of-view transits matched to this source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### newmatchobs

- Column Name: newmatchobs
- Description: The number of transits newly incorporated into an existing source in the current cycle
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### matchobsrm

- Column Name: matchobsrm
- Description: The number of transits removed from an existing source in the current cycle
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### ipdgofha

- Column Name: ipdgofha
- Description: Amplitude of the IPD GoF versus position angle of scan
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### ipdgofhp

- Column Name: ipdgofhp
- Description: Phase of the IPD GoF versus position angle of scan
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### ipdfmp

- Column Name: ipdfmp
- Description: Percent of successful-IPD windows with more than one peak
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### ipdfow

- Column Name: ipdfow
- Description: Percent of transits with truncated windows or multiple gate
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### ruwe

- Column Name: ruwe
- Description: Renormalised unit weight error
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdsk1

- Column Name: sdsk1
- Description: Degree of concentration of scan directions across the source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdsk2

- Column Name: sdsk2
- Description: Degree of concentration of scan directions across the source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdsk3

- Column Name: sdsk3
- Description: Degree of concentration of scan directions across the source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdsk4

- Column Name: sdsk4
- Description: Degree of concentration of scan directions across the source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdmk1

- Column Name: sdmk1
- Description: Mean position angle of scan directions across the source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdmk2

- Column Name: sdmk2
- Description: Mean position angle of scan directions across the source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdmk3

- Column Name: sdmk3
- Description: Mean position angle of scan directions across the source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdmk4

- Column Name: sdmk4
- Description: Mean position angle of scan directions across the source
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### dup

- Column Name: dup
- Description: Source with multiple source identifiers
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### o_gmag

- Column Name: o_gmag
- Description: Number of observations (CCD transits) that contributed to the G mean flux and mean flux error
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### fg

- Column Name: fg
- Description: Mean flux in the G-band
- Unit: e-/s
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_fg

- Column Name: e_fg
- Description: Standard deviation of the G-band fluxes divided by sqrt(photGNObs)
- Unit: e-/s
- Data Type: Float64


#### rfg

- Column Name: rfg
- Description: Mean flux in the G-band divided by its error
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### gmag_vega

- Column Name: gmag_vega
- Description: G-band mean magnitude (Vega)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_gmag

- Column Name: e_gmag
- Description: Standard error of G-band mean magnitude (Vega)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### fgcorr

- Column Name: fgcorr
- Description: Calibration corrected G-band mean flux
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### gmagcorr

- Column Name: gmagcorr
- Description: Calibration corrected G magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_gmagcorr

- Column Name: e_gmagcorr
- Description: Standard error of calibration corrected G magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### o_bpmag

- Column Name: o_bpmag
- Description: Number of observations contributing to BP photometry
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### fbp

- Column Name: fbp
- Description: Mean flux in the integrated BP band
- Unit: e-/s
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_fbp

- Column Name: e_fbp
- Description: Error on the integrated BP mean flux
- Unit: e-/s
- Data Type: Float64


#### rfbp

- Column Name: rfbp
- Description: Integrated BP mean flux divided by its error
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### bpmag

- Column Name: bpmag
- Description: Integrated BP mean magnitude (Vega)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_bpmag

- Column Name: e_bpmag
- Description: Standard error of BP mean magnitude (Vega)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### o_rpmag

- Column Name: o_rpmag
- Description: Number of observations (CCD transits) that contributed to the integrated RP mean flux and mean flux error
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### frp

- Column Name: frp
- Description: Mean flux in the integrated RP band
- Unit: e-/s
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_frp

- Column Name: e_frp
- Description: Error on the integrated RP mean flux
- Unit: e-/s
- Data Type: Float64


#### rfrp

- Column Name: rfrp
- Description: Integrated RP mean flux divided by its error
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### rpmag

- Column Name: rpmag
- Description: Integrated RP mean magnitude (Vega)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_rpmag

- Column Name: e_rpmag
- Description: Standard error of RP mean magnitude (Vega)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### nbpcont

- Column Name: nbpcont
- Description: Number of BP contaminated transits
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### nbpblend

- Column Name: nbpblend
- Description: Number of BP blended transits
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64

- Description: Number of RP contaminated transits
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### nrpblend

- Data Type: Int64

- Data Type: Int64

- Data Type: Float64

- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64

- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### elat

- Column Name: elat
- Description: Ecliptic latitude
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### exfluxerr

- Column Name: exfluxerr
- Description: Metric for source photometric variability
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### brnflag

- Column Name: brnflag
- Description: If 1 it indicates the presence of a source 5 mag brighter than the target in the G-band within 5"
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### meanav

- Column Name: meanav
- Description: Mean extinction value derived from 3D reddening maps
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### minav

- Column Name: minav
- Description: Extinction value derived from 3D reddening maps using -1sigma EDR3 distance
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### maxav

- Column Name: maxav
- Description: Extinction value derived from 3D reddening maps using +1sigma EDR3 distance
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### flagext

- Column Name: flagext
- Description: Flag
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### teffh

- Column Name: teffh
- Description: Effective temperature from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with pure-H model atmospheres
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_teffh

- Column Name: e_teffh
- Description: Uncertainty on teff_H
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float64


#### loggh

- Column Name: loggh
- Description: Log of surface gravity from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with pure-H model atmospheres
- Unit: cm/s2
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_loggh

- Column Name: e_loggh
- Description: Uncertainty on logg_H
- Unit: cm/s2
- Data Type: Float64


#### massh

- Column Name: massh
- Description: Stellar mass resulting from the adopted mass-radius relation and best fit parameters
- Unit: Msun
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_massh

- Column Name: e_massh
- Description: Uncertainty on mass_H
- Unit: Msun
- Data Type: Float64


#### chisqh

- Column Name: chisqh
- Description: chi square value of the fit (pure-H)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64

- Column Name: teffhe
- Description: Effective temperature from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with pure-He model atmospheres
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float64

- Column Name: e_teffhe
- Description: Uncertainty on teff_He
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float64


#### logghe

- Column Name: logghe
- Description: Log of surface gravity from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with pure-He model atmospheres
- Unit: cm/s2
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_logghe

- Column Name: e_logghe
- Description: Uncertainty on logg_He
- Unit: cm/s2
- Data Type: Float64

- Column Name: masshe
- Description: Stellar mass resulting from the adopted mass-radius relation and best fit parameters
- Unit: Msun
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_masshe

- Column Name: e_masshe
- Description: Uncertainty on mass_He
- Unit: Msun
- Data Type: Float64


#### chisqhe

- Column Name: chisqhe
- Description: chi square value of the fit (pure-He)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### teffmix

- Column Name: teffmix
- Description: Effective temperature from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with mixed H-He model atmospheres
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_teffmix

- Column Name: e_teffmix
- Description: Uncertainty on teff_mixed
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float64


#### loggmix

- Column Name: loggmix
- Description: Log of surface gravity from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with mixed H-He model atmospheres
- Unit: cm/s2
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_loggmix

- Column Name: e_loggmix
- Description: Uncertainty on logg_mixed
- Unit: cm/s2
- Data Type: Float64


#### massmix

- Column Name: massmix
- Description: Stellar mass resulting from the adopted mass-radius relation and best fit parameters
- Unit: Msun
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_massmix

- Column Name: e_massmix
- Description: Uncertainty on mass_mixed
- Unit: Msun
- Data Type: Float64


#### chisqmix

- Column Name: chisqmix
- Description: chi square value of the fit (mixed H-He)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### rgeo

- Column Name: rgeo
- Description: Median of the geometric distance posterior (Bailer-Jones et al., 2021AJ....161..147B, Cat. I/352)
- Unit: pc
- Data Type: Float64


#### b_rgeo1

- Column Name: b_rgeo1
- Description: 16th percentile of the geometric distance posterior (Bailer-Jones et al., 2021AJ....161..147B, Cat. I/352)
- Unit: pc
- Data Type: Float64


#### b_rgeo2

- Column Name: b_rgeo2
- Description: 84th percentile of the geometric distance posterior (Bailer-Jones et al., 2021AJ....161..147B, Cat. I/352)
- Unit: pc
- Data Type: Float64


#### rpgeo

- Column Name: rpgeo
- Description: Median of the photogeometric distance posterior (Bailer-Jones et al., 2021AJ....161..147B, Cat. I/352)
- Unit: pc
- Data Type: Float64


#### b_rpgeo1

- Column Name: b_rpgeo1
- Description: 16th percentile of the photogeometric distance posterior (Bailer-Jones et al., 2021AJ....161..147B, Cat. I/352)
- Unit: pc
- Data Type: Float64


#### b_rpgeo2

- Column Name: b_rpgeo2
- Description: 84th percentile of the photogeometric distance posterior (Bailer-Jones et al., 2021AJ....161..147B, Cat. I/352)
- Unit: pc
- Data Type: Float64


#### fidel_v1

- Column Name: fidel_v1
- Description: Astrometric fidelity metric from Rybizki et al., (2021, arXiv:2101.11641)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdss12

- Column Name: sdss12
- Description: SDSS object name if available (SDSS + J2000 coordinates)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### sdssclean

- Column Name: sdssclean
- Description: If 1 the SDSS photometry for this object is considered clean
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64

- Column Name: umag_sdss
- Description: SDSS u band magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_umag_sdss

- Column Name: e_umag_sdss
- Description: SDSS u band magnitude uncertainty
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### gmag_sdss

- Column Name: gmag_sdss
- Description: SDSS g band magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_gmag_sdss

- Description: SDSS g band magnitude uncertainty

- Data Type: Float64

- Column Name: rmag_sdss
- Description: SDSS r band magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_rmag_sdsss

- Column Name: e_rmag_sdsss
- Description: SDSS r band magnitude uncertainty
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### imag_sdss

- Column Name: imag_sdss
- Description: SDSS i band magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_imag_sdss

- Column Name: e_imag_sdss
- Description: SDSS i band magnitude uncertainty
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### zmag_sdss

- Column Name: zmag_sdss
- Description: SDSS z band magnitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### e_zmag_sdss

- Column Name: e_zmag_sdss
- Description: SDSS z band magnitude uncertainty
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdsssep

- Column Name: sdsssep
- Description: Angular separation between the Gaia source and its associated SDSS object, after coordinate propagation
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float64


#### sdssspec

- Column Name: sdssspec
- Description: Number of SDSS spectra available for this object
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64
